name: cervo
title: Cervo
description: Save and search URLs from your clipboard with one keystroke
author: victor_nogueira

commands.name: search-url
commands.title: Cervo
commands.subtitle: Save & search URLs
commands.description: Save, search, open, copy, and manage your bookmarked URLs

preferences.name: autoSaveClipboard
preferences.title: Auto Save Clipboard URL
preferences.description: Detect and save URLs from clipboard when opening Search URLs
preferences.label: Auto Save Clipboard URL

preferences.name: clearClipboardAfterSave
preferences.title: Clear Clipboard After Save
preferences.description: Clear clipboard contents after successfully saving a URL
preferences.label: Clear Clipboard After Save

preferences.name: closeAfterAction
preferences.title: Close After Action
preferences.description: Close Raycast after opening or copying a URL
preferences.label: Close After Action

preferences.name: apiUrl
preferences.title: Cervo API URL
preferences.description: Base URL of your Cervo API (e.g. https://api.cervo.link). Leave empty to use local-only mode.

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: API Key
preferences.description: API key for authenticating with the Cervo API

preferences.name: memberId
preferences.title: Member ID
preferences.description: Your member UUID in the Cervo API

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
